tools.name: get_pricing
tools.description: Full sourced pricing record for one product: tiers with per-tier features, price range, annual discounts, hidden costs, capabilities, verdict, plan advice, category positioning, verification and links.

tools.name: compare_software
tools.description: Structured side-by-side comparison of 2 to 4 products, each a full record plus a compact matrix (starting price, free tier, max annual discount, hidden-cost count).

tools.name: discover_software
tools.description: Find software by criteria: category, max starting price, free-tier requirement, or a keyword. Returns compact cards with the source link for each.

tools.name: get_hidden_costs
tools.description: The costs beyond the sticker price (implementation, add-ons, overage, support) for one product, with the intro context and category positioning. This is the data most pricing answers miss.

tools.name: calculate_tco
tools.description: Total cost of ownership for a team: the seat-aware, annual-aware subscription line plus the hidden-cost line items. Params: slug, seats, tier, billing (monthly|annual).

tools.name: estimate_llm_cost
tools.description: Per-model token rate card ($/1M input, output, cached input, context window) for a token-priced AI product, plus a cost estimate when a token volume is given.

tools.name: get_cost_guide
tools.description: Negotiation-ready true-cost brief for one product: real renewal-rate costs, the vendor cost-transparency score, discount programs that survive renewal, negotiation tactics with expected discount ranges, what is negotiable vs fixed, and a link to a free negotiation email generator.

tools.name: get_price_history
tools.description: Price-stability signal, latest verified snapshot, last observed change and derived trend for one product.

tools.name: get_positioning
tools.description: Where a product sits on price against its category: starting price vs the category median, min, max and sample size — the most citable one-line stat.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_cost_guide · Private data: get_pricing, compare_software, estimate_llm_cost · Public sink: get_cost_guide.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_cost_guide · Private data: get_pricing, compare_software, estimate_llm_cost · Public sink: get_cost_guide

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
